title: Ember's Floating Islands
description: Your skies are too boring? This is the solution - find mystical structures floating in the sky!
body:
![Floating Islands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Embers_Floating_Islands/BH_Embers_Floating_Islands_header.webp)
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Embers_Floating_Islands/BH_Embers_Floating_Islands_description.webp)
This mod is currently adding more than 25 magical floating islands to your world. All of them have a specific theme and most of them have some type of loot. 

Here is a list of floating islands:

- The Paradise Island: A small island with a pond, a field and basic loot. Pretty chill up there!
- The Pillager Island: A deadly island with a pillager fortress!
- The Tower Island: A rather big island with a tower, plenty of goods and a deadly enemy waiting up top ...
- The Flower Island: Spawns with a hut, some loot and a waystone if Waystones is present!
- The Nether Island: A floating island with a ruined portal! 
- The Ruin Island: Two islands with old ruins. Wonder how these buildings used to look like ... Comes with 2 versions!
- The Amethyst Island: A mysterious island made out of huge geodes. It is said to be haunted ...
- The Shrine Island: A small island with a peculiar shrine ...
- The Cemetery Island: An ancient cemetery high above the air, haunted by a horde of undead.
- The Floating Rocks: A couple of natural rocks, floating in the sky. One of them comes with loot!

**Compatibility
**
This mod has a few features that will only appear when specific mods are installed. Here's a list!

**Waystones**: If the Waystones mod is installed, the Flower Island will appear with a waystone!
**Paragliders**: If you have the Paragliders mod installed, the second version of the Shrine Island will come with a Paraglider as loot!

[![Click here to join our discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85f9c068f7691f8eee385f09b2bd43faa78ced0.png)](https://discord.gg/79zymr8mmB)
-

Feel free to ask questions in the comments below - I will add an FAQ as soon as there are enough frequently asked questions.:)
